prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 6539→7265→12440→19643→19077，2023 年起位次大幅后移，2024 年达到峰值 19643 后 2025 年略回升至 19077，近 3 年累计后移约 1.2 万名，整体呈显著下行趋势；本省物理类计划 2021–2024 年均为 36–37 人，2025 年增至 49 人，2026 年计划 52 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 6.1%，扩招对竞争有缓解作用但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 103 名持续上升至 2026 年第 63 名，近年排名显著提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要因 2025 年录取季在河北、河南等地位次下滑超 500 名，中医学专业在东北省份出现断档，可能对 2026 年报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度一般（总排名第 103），短视频曝光量偏低；但中医学、中西医结合等为该校传统优势方向，临床医学/中医学类专业社会热度持续高热。
6. 【专业热度与环境】中医学、临床医学类专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，报考热度不减；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数 15.4 万，较 2025 年（约 11.6 万）大幅增长约 32%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 11.1 万，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京，对内蒙古考生有一定地域吸引力；2025 年该校在内蒙。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类近年位次大幅后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+6.1%）、本省考生总数大幅增加（+32%）以及学校排名持续上升等因素，竞争加剧是主导力量；声誉偏负面可能部分抑制报考热度，但中医学类专业高热推荐 对位次有支撑。，结合考生规模大幅增长做小幅上修，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 19978 名，区间 19478–20478 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 6539 → 7265 → 12440 → 19643 → 19077. Since 2023, the ranking has significantly shifted backward, peaking at 19643 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 19077 in 2025. Over the past three years, the cumulative backward shift is about 12,000 places, showing a clear downward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 36–37 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 49 in 2025, and is planned at 52 for 2026, a modest expansion of about 6.1% compared to 2025. This expansion alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's overall strength and recognition. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a ranking drop of over 500 places in Hebei and Henan during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in Chinese Medicine programs in northeastern provinces, which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm for 2026. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 103rd), with low short video exposure. However, Chinese Medicine and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine are traditional strengths, and clinical medicine/Chinese medicine programs remain highly popular socially.
6. [Program Popularity and Environment] Chinese Medicine and Clinical Medicine programs have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with sustained application enthusiasm. The province's total number of regular college entrance exam takers in 2026 is 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 116,000). Based on recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 111,000, intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Located in Beijing, the university has some regional appeal for Inner Mongolian candidates. In 2025, the university was in Inner Mongolia.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in Physics Category rankings in recent years, the modest enrollment expansion in 2026 (+6.1%), the substantial increase in provincial candidates (+32%), and the continuous rise in school rankings, intensified competition is the dominant factor. Negative reputation may partially suppress application enthusiasm, but the high recommendation of Chinese Medicine programs supports the ranking. With a slight upward adjustment due to the large increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 19,978, with a range of 19,478–20,478.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19,478–20,478, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 programs, aim for Tier 1 flagship programs, and use Tier 3 programs as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 19,000), prioritize Tier 1 programs such as Chinese Medicine Leading Talent Training Program and Hua Tuo Class. For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 20,000), focus on Tier 3 programs and be cautious with Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1498→4592→2140→1436→1530. An abnormally high ranking of 4592 occurred in 2022, but it quickly dropped back. In the past 3 years, it stabilized in the 1436–2140 range, with a baseline of about 1530 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 5 students in 2021, 4 students each year from 2022 to 2025, and 5 students in 2026, a 25% increase compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to the decline in rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other regions during the 2025 admission season, and the Chinese Medicine major experienced a gap in northeastern provinces, which may somewhat suppress the application psychology for 2026. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 103rd), with low short video exposure. Acupuncture and Tuina, Chinese Medicine, etc., are the school's traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as English and Public Administration have average social popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in this province in 2026 is 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000). Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 43,000 History Category examinees, leading to significantly intensified competition. The school is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal for Inner Mongolia examinees. In 2025, the school enrolled 4 History Category students in Inner Mongolia, accounting for a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent narrow fluctuation of History Category rankings around 1500, the 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province (+32%), and the continuous rise in school rankings, the expansion will lower the ranking, but the substantial growth in examinee numbers will offset this. The somewhat negative reputation may partially suppress application enthusiasm. Taking into account the growth in examinee numbers, a slight upward adjustment is made, predicting the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 to be approximately 1790, with a range of 1468–2112.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 1468–2112, it is recommended to aim for Acupuncture and Tuina as a sprint target, choose English majors as the main options, and use Public Administration as a safety school. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1400), you can sprint for Tier 1 majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 2000), it is recommended to use Public Administration as a safety school.
